# Wizard Class Feats — Levels 1–10

> **Source**: Archives of Nethys (2e.aonprd.com), Wizard Feats Trait page  
> **Total feats (L1–10)**: 31  
> **Date compiled**: July 2025  
> **Note**: Body text for Cantrip Expansion and Steady Spellcasting could not be fully extracted due to AoN's dynamic JavaScript rendering. Partial text from AoN fetch is included; standard PF2e rules text is noted where supplemented.

---

## Level 1 Feats (5)

---

### Counterspell ◆◇ [Reaction]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 1 |
| **Traits** | Witch, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 201 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | Reaction |
| **Trigger** | A creature Casts a Spell that you have prepared |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 633 |

**Description:**  
When a foe Casts a Spell and you can see its manifestations, you can use your own magic to disrupt it. You expend a prepared spell to counter the triggering creature's casting of that same spell. You lose your spell slot as if you had cast the triggering spell. You then attempt to counteract the triggering spell.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Reaction trigger: a creature Casts a Spell you have prepared  
- Expend a prepared copy of the same spell to attempt to counteract it  
- Uses standard counteract rules

---

### Familiar

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 1 |
| **Traits** | Magus, Sorcerer, Thaumaturge, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 201; Player Core 2 pg. 152 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | — (Passive) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core / Player Core 2) |
| **AoN ID** | 5024 |

**Description:**  
You make a pact with a creature that serves you and assists your spellcasting. You gain a familiar.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Grants a familiar companion  
- Sets base familiar/master abilities (typically 2 per day)

---

### Reach Spell ◆ [One Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 1 |
| **Traits** | Bard, Cleric, Concentrate, Druid, Oracle, Sorcerer, Spellshape, Witch, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 101; Player Core 2 pg. 138 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | One Action (◆) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core / Player Core 2) |
| **AoN ID** | 4577 |

**Description:**  
You can extend your spells' range. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that has a range, increase that spell's range by 30 feet. As is standard for increasing spell ranges, if the spell normally has a range of touch, you extend its range to 30 feet.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Spellshape (use immediately before casting)  
- Increases spell range by 30 feet  
- Touch spells become 30-foot range  
- 1-action cost

---

### Spellbook Prodigy

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 1 |
| **Traits** | Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 201 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | — (Passive) |
| **Prerequisites** | Trained in Arcana |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5025 |

**Description:**  
You are a consummate professional when it comes to recording and deciphering spells. You gain the Magical Shorthand skill feat. Additionally, if you critically fail to Learn a Spell, you can try again later—treat the critical failure as a failure instead.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Free Magical Shorthand skill feat  
- Critical failure on Learn a Spell becomes a regular failure (can retry)

---

### Widen Spell ◆ [One Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 1 |
| **Traits** | Druid, Manipulate, Oracle, Sorcerer, Spellshape, Witch, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 128; Player Core 2 pg. 138 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | One Action (◆) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core / Player Core 2) |
| **AoN ID** | 4715 |

**Description:**  
You manipulate the energy of your spell, causing it to spread out and affect a wider area. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that has an area of a burst, cone, or line and does not have a duration, increase the area of that spell. Add 5 feet to the radius of a burst that normally has a radius of at least 10 feet (a burst with a smaller radius is not affected). Add 5 feet to the length of a cone or line that is normally 15 feet long or smaller, and add 10 feet to the length of a larger cone or line.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Spellshape (use immediately before casting)  
- +5 ft to burst radius (10 ft+ base)  
- +5 ft to cones/lines 15 ft or less; +10 ft to larger  
- Only works on spells without a duration

---

## Level 2 Feats (5)

---

### Cantrip Expansion

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 2 |
| **Traits** | Bard, Cleric, Magus, Oracle, Psychic, Sorcerer, Witch, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 101; Player Core 2 pg. 138 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | — (Passive) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core / Player Core 2) |
| **AoN ID** | 4580 |

**Description:**  
Study broadens your range of simple spells. You can prepare two additional cantrips each day. *(For spontaneous casters: add two additional cantrips from your spell list to your repertoire.)*

> **Note**: AoN's dynamic JavaScript page did not fully render the body text on multiple fetch attempts. The above text reflects the AoN search summary plus standard PF2e rules text for this well-known feat.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Wizard (prepared): +2 cantrip preparations per day  
- Spontaneous casters: +2 cantrips in repertoire

---

### Conceal Spell ◆ [One Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 2 |
| **Traits** | Animist, Concentrate, Spellshape, Witch, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core (Remastered) |
| **Action** | One Action (◆) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 640 |

**Description:**  
Hiding your gestures and incantations within other speech and movement, you attempt to conceal the fact that you are Casting a Spell. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell, the spell gains the subtle trait, hiding the shining runes, sparks of magic, and other manifestations that would usually give away your spellcasting. The trait hides only the spell's spellcasting actions and manifestations, not its effects.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Spellshape: next Cast a Spell gains the subtle trait  
- Hides spellcasting actions/manifestations (not effects)

---

### Energy Ablation ◆ [One Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 2 |
| **Traits** | Spellshape, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core (Remastered) |
| **Action** | One Action (◆) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5026 |

**Description:**  
You study the energy of your spell and convert some of it to a protective barrier. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that deals acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage, before you cast it, you gain resistance to that type of damage equal to the spell's rank. The resistance lasts until the end of your next turn.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Spellshape: before casting energy damage spell  
- Gain resistance to chosen energy type = spell rank  
- Lasts until end of next turn

---

### Enhanced Familiar

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 2 |
| **Traits** | Animist, Druid, Magus, Sorcerer, Thaumaturge, Witch, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 129; Player Core 2 pg. 153 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | — (Passive) |
| **Prerequisites** | A familiar |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core / Player Core 2) |
| **AoN ID** | 4717 |

**Description:**  
You infuse your familiar with additional primal energy, increasing its abilities. You can select four familiar or master abilities each day, instead of two.

**Special [Witch]:** Add one extra ability.  
**Special [Wizard]:** If you have the improved familiar attunement thesis, your base is four (so Enhanced Familiar raises it further).

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Familiar/master abilities per day: 2 → 4  
- Witch gets +1 bonus ability  
- Wizard with improved familiar attunement thesis: base becomes 4

---

### Nonlethal Spell ◆ [One Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 2 |
| **Traits** | Manipulate, Spellshape, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core (Remastered) |
| **Action** | One Action (◆) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5027 |

**Description:**  
You blunt the force of your spell to avoid dealing a killing blow. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that deals damage and doesn't have the death or void trait, that spell gains the nonlethal trait.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Spellshape: next damage spell gains nonlethal trait  
- Cannot be used on spells with death or void traits

---

## Level 4 Feats (6)

---

### Bespell Strikes ◇ [Free Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 4 |
| **Traits** | Oracle, Sorcerer, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core (Remastered) |
| **Action** | Free Action (◇) |
| **Frequency** | Once per turn |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5028 |

**Description:**  
You channel the magical energy of spells you cast into your weapon and body. After you cast a non-cantrip spell, your next weapon or unarmed Strike deals an extra 1d6 force damage, or 1d6 of the same damage type the spell dealt if it dealt damage. This extra damage lasts until the end of your turn. For Wizard, this Strike gains the arcane trait.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Free action, 1/turn, after casting non-cantrip  
- +1d6 force (or matching spell damage type) on next Strike  
- Wizard: Strike gains arcane trait  
- Lasts until end of turn

---

### Call Wizardly Tools ◆ [One Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 4 |
| **Traits** | Concentrate, Teleportation, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core (Remastered) |
| **Action** | One Action (◆) |
| **Prerequisites** | Arcane bond |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5029 |

**Description:**  
You magically call your bonded item or spellbook to you. The item teleports into your hand from up to 1 mile away. The item must weigh 1 Bulk or less. If the item is in another creature's possession, this ability fails.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Teleports bonded item or spellbook to hand  
- Range: up to 1 mile  
- Max 1 Bulk  
- Fails if held by another creature

---

### Irezoko Tattoo ◆◆◆ [Three Actions]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 4 |
| **Traits** | Uncommon; Barbarian, Bard, Champion, Cleric, Druid, Fighter, Gunslinger, Inventor, Magus, Monk, Oracle, Ranger, Rogue, Sorcerer, Summoner, Swashbuckler, Witch, Wizard |
| **Source** | Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 185 (Legacy) |
| **Action** | Three-Action Activity (◆◆◆), 1/day |
| **Prerequisites** | Expert in Arcana or Occultism |
| **Access** | Member of the College of Mysteries |
| **Remastered?** | No (Legacy) |
| **AoN ID** | 3421 |

**Description:**  
Your face bears an intricate magical tattoo known as the irezoko. Choose a class that you are a member of that grants you access to a focus pool. When you take this feat, it gains the trait that applies to your chosen class. Once per day, you may concentrate upon the pattern of your irezoko to recover 1 Focus Point as a three-action activity.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- 1/day: recover 1 Focus Point (3-action activity)  
- Requires a class with a focus pool  
- Uncommon; requires College of Mysteries access

---

### Linked Focus

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 4 |
| **Traits** | Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core (Remastered) |
| **Action** | — (Passive) |
| **Prerequisites** | Arcane bond; arcane school |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5030 |

**Description:**  
You have linked your bonded item and your focus, so that channeling one restores the other. Once per day, when you Drain your Bonded Item to cast a spell that is in your arcane school's curriculum, you also regain 1 Focus Point.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- 1/day: Drain Bonded Item on a curriculum spell → also regain 1 Focus Point  
- Requires both arcane bond and arcane school

---

### Spell Protection Array ◆ [One Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 4 |
| **Traits** | Arcane, Manipulate, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core (Remastered) |
| **Action** | One Action (◆) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5031 |

**Description:**  
You create a small protective magical field. Choose a point within 30 feet. You create a 5-foot burst centered on that point. Creatures inside the burst gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against magic. You can Sustain this effect for up to 1 minute.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- 5-ft burst within 30 ft  
- +1 status bonus to saves vs. magic for creatures inside  
- Sustain up to 1 minute

---

### Undying Conviction

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 4 |
| **Traits** | Uncommon; Aura, Cleric, Necromancy, Oracle, Wizard |
| **Source** | Book of the Dead pg. 33 (Legacy) |
| **Action** | — (Passive Aura) |
| **Prerequisites** | Able to create or control undead; must be a negative font cleric, bones mystery oracle, or necromancy school wizard |
| **Remastered?** | No (Legacy) |
| **AoN ID** | 3483 |

**Description:**  
Your presence has a bolstering effect on your undead minions. Undead creatures under your control and within a 30-foot emanation gain a +2 status bonus to saving throws to resist positive damage and to Will saving throws to resist effects that would make them controlled.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- 30-ft aura  
- Undead minions: +2 status bonus to saves vs. positive damage  
- Undead minions: +2 status bonus to Will saves vs. controlled effects  
- Uncommon; specific class/subclass prerequisite

---

## Level 6 Feats (6)

---

### Convincing Illusion ◆◇ [Reaction]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 6 |
| **Traits** | Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core (Remastered) |
| **Action** | Reaction |
| **Prerequisites** | Expert in Deception |
| **Trigger** | A creature succeeds (but doesn't critically succeed) at a Perception check or Will save to disbelieve an illusion from a spell you cast |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5032 |

**Description:**  
You use your deceptive skills to reinforce your illusions. When a creature succeeds (but doesn't critically succeed) at disbelieving your illusion spell, you can attempt a Deception check against that creature's Perception DC. If you succeed, the creature fails to disbelieve the illusion instead.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Reaction on successful (non-critical) disbelief  
- Deception check vs. Perception DC  
- Success: creature fails to disbelieve instead

---

### Detonating Spell ◆ [One Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 6 |
| **Traits** | Uncommon; Cleric, Concentrate, Metamagic, Oracle, Sorcerer, Witch, Wizard |
| **Source** | Knights of Lastwall pg. 83 (Legacy) |
| **Action** | One Action (◆) |
| **Access** | Knights of Lastwall member |
| **Remastered?** | No (Legacy — uses Metamagic trait instead of Spellshape) |
| **AoN ID** | 3632 |

**Description:**  
Your spell becomes volatile and explosive. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that deals damage to a single target and the spell successfully damages the target, it also deals splash damage equal to the spell's level to creatures within 5 feet of the target. This splash damage doesn't apply to the primary target. The splash damage type matches the spell's damage type (or the type of your choice if it deals multiple types).

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Metamagic: next single-target damage spell gains splash damage  
- Splash = spell level to adjacent creatures (not the target)  
- Uncommon; requires Knights of Lastwall access

---

### Explosive Arrival ◇ [Free Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 6 |
| **Traits** | Concentrate, Manipulate, Spellshape, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core (Remastered) |
| **Action** | Free Action (◇) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5033 |

**Description:**  
You imbue a summoned creature with a burst of destructive energy. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that summons a creature, the summoned creature arrives in an explosion. When it appears, it deals 1d4 fire damage per rank of the spell in a 10-foot emanation centered on the summoned creature.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Free action Spellshape before summoning spell  
- 1d4 fire per spell rank in 10-ft emanation around summoned creature  
- Only works with summoning spells

---

### Irresistible Magic

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 6 |
| **Traits** | Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core (Remastered) |
| **Action** | — (Passive) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5034 |

**Description:**  
Your spells overwhelm even those with magical defenses. When a creature has a status bonus to saving throws against magic (such as from a spell or magic item), that bonus is reduced by 1 against your spells (minimum +0).

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Passive: creatures' status bonuses to saves vs. magic are reduced by 1 against your spells  
- Affects any status bonus to saves vs. magic

---

### Split Slot

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 6 |
| **Traits** | Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 203 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | — (Passive) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5035 |

**Description:**  
You can prepare two spells in a single spell slot, as long as both spells are at least 1 rank lower than your highest-rank spell slot. When you cast one of the spells from that slot, the unused spell dissipates. You choose which spell to cast at the time of casting. You can split only one slot per day in this way.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Prepare 2 spells in 1 slot (both at least 1 rank lower than highest)  
- Choose which to cast; the other is lost  
- 1 split slot per day

---

### Steady Spellcasting

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 6 |
| **Traits** | Bard, Cleric, Druid, Oracle, Psychic, Sorcerer, Witch, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 103; Player Core 2 pg. 140 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | — (Passive) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core / Player Core 2) |
| **Leads To** | Battlefield Arcana, Ward Casting |
| **AoN ID** | 4602 |

**Description:**  
Confident in your technique, you don't easily lose your concentration when you Cast a Spell. If a reaction would disrupt your spellcasting action, attempt a DC 15 flat check. If you succeed, your action isn't disrupted.

> **Note**: The beginning of the body text was truncated by AoN's dynamic rendering. The partial text retrieved from AoN was "...action, attempt a DC 15 flat check. If you succeed, your action isn't disrupted." The full opening sentence is reconstructed from standard PF2e rules text.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Passive protection against disruption  
- DC 15 flat check when a reaction would disrupt your spellcasting  
- Success: spellcasting is not disrupted

---

## Level 8 Feats (6)

---

### Advanced School Spell

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 8 |
| **Traits** | Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 203 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | — (Passive) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5036 |

**Description:**  
You gain access to the advanced teachings of your arcane institution, learning a powerful new school spell. You gain the advanced school spell for your arcane school.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Grants the advanced focus spell for your chosen arcane school  
- Specific spell depends on school chosen

---

### Bond Conservation ◆ [One Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 8 |
| **Traits** | Manipulate, Spellshape, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core (Remastered) |
| **Action** | One Action (◆) |
| **Prerequisites** | Arcane bond |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 648 |

**Description:**  
By careful parceling of magical energy, you can conserve your bonded item's power to cast additional spells. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell using the extra spell slot from Drain Bonded Item, you gain an extra use of Drain Bonded Item that day. This extra use must be used to cast a spell at least 2 ranks lower than the first spell cast with Drain Bonded Item.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Spellshape: use before casting via Drain Bonded Item  
- Gain an additional Drain Bonded Item use that day  
- Extra use must be for a spell 2+ ranks lower

---

### Chaotic Spell ◆ [One Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 8 |
| **Traits** | Uncommon; Bard, Manipulate, Metamagic, Oracle, Sorcerer, Witch, Wizard |
| **Source** | Wake the Dead #3 pg. 25 (Legacy) |
| **Action** | One Action (◆) |
| **Remastered?** | No (Legacy — uses Metamagic trait) |
| **AoN ID** | 4386 |

**Description:**  
You add a chaotic and unpredictable element to your spell. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that deals acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage, roll 1d6 to determine the spell's damage type and an additional effect:

| d6 | Damage Type | Additional Effect |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Acid | Target is sickened 1 |
| 2 | Cold | Target takes –10-foot status penalty to Speed |
| 3 | Electricity | Target is flat-footed |
| 4 | Fire | Target takes persistent fire damage = spell level |
| 5 | Force | No additional effect |
| 6 | Sonic | Target is deafened for 2 rounds |

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Metamagic: changes energy damage type randomly (d6)  
- Each result adds a different debuff  
- Uncommon

---

### Form Retention

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 8 |
| **Traits** | Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 203 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | — (Passive) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5038 |

**Description:**  
When preparing a polymorph spell that lasts 1 minute and grants a battle form, you can prepare the spell in a slot 2 ranks higher than normal. This doesn't grant any of the normal benefits of heightening a spell, but the spell lasts up to 10 minutes.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Prepare battle form polymorph spell in a slot 2 ranks higher  
- Duration increases from 1 minute to 10 minutes  
- No other heightening benefits

---

### Helt's Spelldance ◆◆◆ [Three Actions]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 8 |
| **Traits** | Uncommon; Bard, Sorcerer, Witch, Wizard |
| **Source** | Firebrands pg. 77 (Legacy) |
| **Action** | Three Actions (◆◆◆) |
| **Prerequisites** | Expert in Performance |
| **Access** | Second mark member of the Firebrands |
| **Remastered?** | No (Legacy) |
| **AoN ID** | 4130 |

**Description:**  
You combine spellcasting with a daring dance. Attempt a Performance check against all observers' Perception DCs. Then Stride once (or twice). During this movement, you don't trigger reactions from creatures against whose Perception DC you succeeded. After your movement, Cast a Spell. The spell must take 1 or 2 actions to cast if you Strode once, or only 1 action if you Strode twice.

**Critical Success:** The targets also take a –1 circumstance penalty to saves against the spell.

Creatures are temporarily immune to Helt's Spelldance for 10 minutes after being targeted.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Performance vs. Perception DCs of all observers  
- Stride 1–2 times; avoiding reactions from succeeded targets  
- Cast a Spell after movement (action limit based on Strides)  
- Critical success: –1 circumstance penalty to saves vs. the spell  
- Uncommon; Firebrands access required

---

### Knowledge is Power

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 8 |
| **Traits** | Magus, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 203 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | — (Passive) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5039 |

**Description:**  
When you critically succeed at a Recall Knowledge check about a creature, you can invoke your knowledge to make the creature take a –1 circumstance penalty to either AC and saves against the next attack you make against it, or the next spell you cast that it needs to defend against. The creature takes the same penalty to its attack or DC the next time it attacks against you or causes you to attempt a save against one of its effects. If you share this information with your allies, they gain the benefits as well. If not used, the bonuses end after 1 minute.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Triggered on critical success Recall Knowledge  
- –1 circumstance penalty to target's AC/saves vs. your next attack/spell  
- OR –1 to target's attack/DC vs. you  
- Shareable with allies  
- Expires after 1 minute if unused

---

## Level 10 Feats (3)

---

### Overwhelming Energy ◆ [One Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 10 |
| **Traits** | Druid, Manipulate, Sorcerer, Spellshape, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 133; Player Core 2 pg. 155 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | One Action (◆) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core / Player Core 2) |
| **AoN ID** | 4743 |

**Description:**  
With a complex gesture, you call upon the primal power of your spell to overcome enemies' resistances. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell, the spell ignores an amount of the target's resistance to acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage equal to your level. This applies to all damage the spell deals, including persistent damage and damage caused by an ongoing effect of the spell, such as the wall created by *wall of fire*. A creature's immunities are unaffected.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Spellshape: next spell ignores energy resistance = your level  
- Applies to acid, cold, electricity, fire, sonic  
- Includes persistent damage and ongoing spell effects  
- Does NOT bypass immunities

---

### Quickened Casting ◇ [Free Action]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 10 |
| **Traits** | Bard, Concentrate, Oracle, Sorcerer, Spellshape, Witch, Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 105; Player Core 2 pg. 141 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | Free Action (◇) |
| **Frequency** | Once per day |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core / Player Core 2) |
| **AoN ID** | 4614 |

**Description:**  
If your next action is to cast a cantrip or a spell that is at least 2 ranks lower than the highest-rank spell slot you have, reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

**Special:** This can only be used on a cantrip or spell from the class matching the one you gained this feat from.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Free action, 1/day  
- Reduces casting time by 1 action (minimum 1)  
- Only for cantrips or spells 2+ ranks lower than highest slot  
- Class-locked (Wizard version for arcane spells only)

---

### Scroll Adept

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Level** | 10 |
| **Traits** | Wizard |
| **Source** | Player Core pg. 203 (Remastered) |
| **Action** | — (Passive) |
| **Remastered?** | Yes (Player Core) |
| **AoN ID** | 5040 |

**Description:**  
During your daily preparations, you can create two temporary scrolls containing arcane spells from your spellbook. Each scroll must be of a different spell rank, and both spell ranks must be 2 or more ranks lower than your highest-rank spell. Any scrolls you create this way become non-magical the next time you make your daily preparations. A temporary scroll has no value if sold.

At master proficiency in your spellcasting, you can create 3 scrolls. At legendary proficiency, you can create 4 scrolls.

**Key Mechanical Effects:**  
- Daily prep: create 2 temporary scrolls (different ranks, 2+ lower than highest)  
- Scrolls expire at next daily prep; no sale value  
- Master → 3 scrolls; Legendary → 4 scrolls

---
